title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. chlorophyllotropum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. chlorophyllotropum is a subspecies of Hieracium lachenalii, a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory congestion. Hieracium lachenalii subsp. chlorophyllotropum can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical treatment for skin issues and wounds.
